chapter_title.en: Chapter 68 – Goodly relationship with the relatives

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/384)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/384)
text: إِنَّ رَحِمَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام ) لَمُعَلَّقَةٌ بِالْعَرْشِ تَقُولُ اللَّهُمَّ صِلْ مَنْ وَصَلَنِي وَ اقْطَعْ مَنْ قَطَعَنِي
ثُمَّ هِيَ جَارِيَةٌ بَعْدَهَا فِي أَرْحَامِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ثُمَّ تَلَا هَذِهِ الْآيَةَ وَ اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ الَّذِي تَسائَلُونَ بِهِ وَ الْأَرْحامَ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Al Washha, from Muhammad Bin Fuzayl Al Sayrafi,

(It has been narrated) from Al Reza<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The kinship of the Progeny<sup>asws</sup> of Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>, the Imams<sup>asws</sup>, would attach with the Throne saying: ‘O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! Maintain Relationship with the one who maintained (relationship with) me, and Cut off the one who cut me off’.
Then if flows, after it, in the relationships of the Believers’. Then heasws recited this Verse [4:1] and fear Allah, by Whom you are asking by Him and the kinship’.
en.sarwar: 26. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from al-Washsha’ from Muhammad ibn Fudayl al-Sayrafi from al-Rida (a.s.) who has said the following: “The kindred relation of the family of Muhammad, the A ’immah (people who possess Divine Authority), recipients of divine supreme covenant, holds to the Throne (of the Lord) and says, ‘O Lord establish good relations with those who establish good relations with me and cut off with those who cut off with me. ’ Thereafter it is applicable to the kindred relations of the believers. The Imam then read this verse: ‘Have fear of the One by whose name you swear to settle your differences and have respect for your relatives. . . [4:1]
